Donkey
Brave Standard Bearer Plate Mail

Once in a while, when the unit is silenced or stunned, the unit throws grenades at 3 random enemies in a small radius around themself. Each grenade deals magic damage equal to 30% of the target's max health to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it and has a 70% chance to stun the main target for 3 sec. The armor wearer restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by grenades.

If the armor wearer's health drops below 50%, they start throwing additional grenades whenever they take any damage up to once every 6 sec.

If the unit dies, they throw more grenade at 3 random enemies in a small radius around themself before dying.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
